violations.text: The hand-washing sink at the cook/grill line was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of brown/black residue (ice machine), food, and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine is being emptied to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025
Chili observed in the walk-in cooler dated 5/27. Foods prepared in the establishment are only safe for 7 days. Voluntary disposal during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

Beverage tubing was observed in contact with ice used for drinks at the bar. Beverage tubing and cold plate beverage cooling devices must not be in contact with stored ice used for drinks. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025

The cutting boards of prep unit #1 is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Employee must register with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as Certified Food Safety Manager. New Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2024
Bus bucket observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, ice machine, knives) were observed with an accumulation of residue, food, and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine is being drained to be properly cleaned. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024

The cutting boards of the prep units are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2024

Refrigerator door gaskets of prep unit #1, the 2-door reach-in, and the single lowboy unit, were observed in poor repair, splitting away from the doors. Gaskets are to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2024

The condensate from the walk-in refrigeration unit is draining into a fish bucket. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain or be evaporated using an evaporator. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2024
